title: RunPod card-dropdown RAM accuracy (per-DC lowestPrice)
description: GPU-picker RAM shows a global floor (A4500 = 29GB) not the real per-DC value (62GB on EU-RO-1, matching the user's 57GB Pod). Fix: pass dataCenterId + secureCloud:true into the lowestPrice GraphQL input, re-query on DC change. See brief.md.
activeSessionTitle: MPI-77 session 1 — investigation done, per-DC fix proven, code pending coordination
